user.title: HA AI Companion
user.description: Set up your HA AI Companion to manage Home Assistant configuration files through natural language.

data.nodered_token: Node-RED API Token (optional, if auth is enabled)
data.nodered_flows_file: Node-RED Flows File fallback (optional, relative to config dir)
data.suggestion_model: Suggestion Model (optional) — all 3 suggestion fields must be set together
data.config_model: Config Model (optional) — all 3 config fields must be set together

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the API. Please check your API key and URL.

abort.already_configured: HA AI Companion is already configured.
